productDisplayName: Peter England Men Black Formal Trousers
description: Style Note Crafted from a soft fabric, these trousers from peter england will keep you feeling comfortable while giving you a suitably professional look. Team them with a crisp formal shirt, classy accessories and leather shoes. Product Details Black trouser with flat front, pockets on the sides, two pockets at the back with button closures, looped waist, and a zipper and button closure on the front Material and Care Polyester Viscose Machine wash warm in a gentle cycle, using a mild detergent Use only non-chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry low Warm iron Size and Fit Smart Fit The model (height 6' and waist 32&rdquo ) is wearing a size 34
